Package sailpoint.api

Class Workflower.ForwardAudit

  • java.lang.Object
    • sailpoint.api.Workflower.ForwardAudit
  • Enclosing class:
    Workflower
    public static class Workflower.ForwardAudit
extends java.lang.Object
    A representation of a forwarding audit event. This class is a wrapper around AuditEvents that allows convenient construction and retrieval of forwarding audit-related information.
